body_text:
23:26 â November 1, 2023
Secure Site Update
As of Friday, November 10, news, updates, and information will no longer be posted on the secure site.
Starting on Friday, November 10, weâll no longer post news, updates and information on the secure site. This includes the content in Client Support, release notes, Products & Services, etc. All of this information is available on the
Client Centre
.
Client Centre Email Notifications
Starting on Friday, November 3, email notifications will be available for you. Stay up to date with fraud warnings, government updates, forms and manuals releases, the latest Central 1 news and events, industry news, and news and updates from our Product Centres.
Subscribe to Client Centre email notifications
here
.
If you have visited the Client Centre before November 1, 2023, you will be automatically subscribed to Client Centre email notifications, with the option to update your preferences or unsubscribe.
How to Access Manuals via the Client Centre
The secure siteâs Policies and Procedures page is now on the Client Centreâs
Forms and Manuals
page. Your access to each manual remains the same as before.
Figure 1: Secure Site, Policies and Procedures page
Figure 2: Client Centre, Forms and Manuals page
Coming soonâ¦ a new Forms experience
We are working on a new experience for you to search and access your forms. Stay tuned!
Payments Centre
The Payment Solutions Manual is also accessible via the
Payments Centre
, under Resources, where other documents, e.g., overviews and user guides, are available.
Questions?
Be sure to check out our
FAQs
section on the Client Centre. If you have any questions or concerns about this change, please contact your Relationship Manager.
Client Support Services, phone
1-888-889-7878,
Option 1, email
support@central1.com
.
